tasks.subject: Task 1: Schema — Match.venue/city + MatchOdds model
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add venue/city columns to Match and a separate 1:1 MatchOdds model, migrate, regenerate client.

**Files:** prisma/schema.prisma

**Verify:** env $ENV npm run db:migrate -- --name venues_and_odds && env $ENV npx prisma generate && npm run typecheck

```json:metadata
{"files": ["prisma/schema.prisma"], "verifyCommand": "env $ENV npm run db:migrate -- --name venues_and_odds && env $ENV npx prisma generate && npm run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Match has venue/city nullable", "Match has odds MatchOdds? relation", "MatchOdds model with matchId @unique + 3 Float probs + raw Json + source + fetchedAt", "migration applied + client regenerated + typecheck clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: MATCH_SCHEDULE static venue data (TDD)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure module mapping matchNo to host city, venue/city/accent derived from a stable 16-stadium table.

**Files:** lib/scoring/schedule.ts, lib/scoring/schedule.test.ts

**Verify:** npx vitest run lib/scoring/schedule.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/scoring/schedule.ts", "lib/scoring/schedule.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run lib/scoring/schedule.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["HOST_CITIES has all 16 host cities keyed by palette tokens", "MATCH_CITY maps every matchNo 1-104 to a valid token", "venueFor returns {venue,city,cityToken} or null", "test enforces 16 tokens + 104 coverage + token validity"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Seed venue/city + verify-venues script
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Write venue/city into Match rows on seed; add a verification script.

**Files:** prisma/seed.ts, scripts/verify-venues.ts

**Verify:** env $ENV npx tsx prisma/seed.ts && env $ENV npx tsx scripts/verify-venues.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["prisma/seed.ts", "scripts/verify-venues.ts"], "verifyCommand": "env $ENV npx tsx prisma/seed.ts && env $ENV npx tsx scripts/verify-venues.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["seed writes venue/city via venueFor in create+update", "verify-venues prints per-match venue/city and counts missing", "re-seed idempotent; all 104 have venue/city"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Thread venue/city through match model + selectors (TDD)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Carry venue/city through MatchInput/MatchCenterRow and MatchDetail.

**Files:** lib/pool/match-center.ts, lib/pool/match-center.test.ts, lib/pool/queries.ts

**Verify:** npx vitest run lib/pool/match-center.test.ts && npm run typecheck

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/pool/match-center.ts", "lib/pool/match-center.test.ts", "lib/pool/queries.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run lib/pool/match-center.test.ts && npm run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["MatchInput + MatchCenterRow carry venue/city", "buildRow passes them through", "MatchDetail carries venue/city", "all selectors select+populate venue/city", "match-center test passes + typecheck clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Venue/city UI on fixture cards + match detail
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Render 'Venue · City' with host-city accent on fixture cards + match-detail header.

**Files:** app/pool/[code]/VenueLine.tsx, MatchCenter.tsx, ScoreCards.tsx, LiveNow.tsx, matches/[no]/page.tsx

**Verify:** env $ENV npm run build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/pool/[code]/VenueLine.tsx", "app/pool/[code]/MatchCenter.tsx", "app/pool/[code]/ScoreCards.tsx", "app/pool/[code]/LiveNow.tsx", "app/pool/[code]/matches/[no]/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "env $ENV npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["VenueLine accents by city token, null-safe", "MatchCenter rows show venue line", "ScoreCards + LiveNow show venue line", "match detail header shows venue/city", "build succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Odds env config + The Odds API client
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Graceful-degrading ODDS_API_KEY config + thin Odds API client.

**Files:** lib/env.ts, lib/odds/client.ts

**Verify:** npm run typecheck

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/env.ts", "lib/odds/client.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["env has ODDS_API_KEY/BASE/REGION with defaults", "oddsApiEnabled exported", "parseOddsEvents+fetchOddsEvents return typed h2h events", "typecheck clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Odds mapping helpers (pure, TDD)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure tested helpers: team normalize, matchNo resolve, implied probs, live upset.

**Files:** lib/odds/map.ts, lib/odds/map.test.ts

**Verify:** npx vitest run lib/odds/map.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/odds/map.ts", "lib/odds/map.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run lib/odds/map.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["toImpliedProbs normalizes to sum 1", "normalizeTeam resolves names+aliases, null on unknown", "resolveMatchNo matches unordered pair, null otherwise", "liveUpset LIVE-only underdog-ahead logic", "tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Odds poller + cron route + verify-odds
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fetch odds, map to matchNos, upsert MatchOdds; CRON_SECRET route; cron ping; verify script.

**Files:** lib/odds/poll.ts, app/api/cron/poll-odds/route.ts, scripts/verify-odds.ts, scripts/cron.mjs

**Verify:** npm run typecheck && env $ENV npm run build && env $ENV npx tsx scripts/verify-odds.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/odds/poll.ts", "app/api/cron/poll-odds/route.ts", "scripts/verify-odds.ts", "scripts/cron.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "npm run typecheck && env $ENV npm run build && env $ENV npx tsx scripts/verify-odds.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pollOdds no-ops when odds disabled", "enabled path fetch->normalize->resolve->upsert MatchOdds with summary", "cron route constant-time secret", "cron.mjs pings poll-odds", "verify-odds prints summary+unmatched", "typecheck+build pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Win-prob bar + live upset + pick-difficulty UI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Surface odds in selectors; win-prob bar (cards+detail), LIVE-only upset badge, pick-difficulty (detail only).

**Files:** lib/pool/match-center.ts, lib/pool/queries.ts, app/pool/[code]/WinProbBar.tsx, MatchCenter.tsx, matches/[no]/page.tsx

**Verify:** npm run typecheck && env $ENV npm run build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/pool/match-center.ts", "lib/pool/queries.ts", "app/pool/[code]/WinProbBar.tsx", "app/pool/[code]/MatchCenter.tsx", "app/pool/[code]/matches/[no]/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run typecheck && env $ENV npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["row+detail carry odds triple", "selectors populate odds", "WinProbBar null-safe H/D/A split", "LIVE-only upset badge", "match detail pick-difficulty label", "typecheck+build pass"]}
```
